response: Thank you for reaching out to HackerRank Support. We understand your concern about your test result. response:

Issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
Subject: Subscription pause
response:
Thank you for reaching out! We understand you'd like to pause your HackerRank subscription due to a halt in hiring efforts.

The **Pause Subscription** feature is available, but please note it is only supported for **individual self-serve plan subscribers** on the following monthly plans:
- Individual Monthly - Basic
- Interview Monthly

Additionally, the following prerequisites must be met:
1. Your subscription must have been active for **at least 30 days** (accounts in a 7-day renewal grace period also qualify).
2. You must be on a **monthly subscription** (not an annual or enterprise plan).

If your account meets these criteria, here's how to pause:
1. Click on the **profile icon** in the top-right corner and select **Settings**.
2. Navigate to the **Billing** section under **Subscription** and follow the prompts to pause.

If your plan does not qualify for the pause feature, you may consider **canceling your subscription** instead. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing cycle, and you'll retain access to your plan features until then.

If you're unsure whether your plan qualifies or need further assistance, please let us know your plan type and we can help guide you further.
justification: The corpus excerpt [1] directly addresses the Pause Subscription feature, including its prerequisites (active subscription 30+ days, monthly self-serve plans only). Since the user's plan type is unknown and the pause feature is restricted to specific plans, the response covers both the pause option and the cancellation alternative from excerpts [2] and [4], without making assumptions about eligibility.

Issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
Subject: Certificate name update
response:
Hi there! Thank you for reaching out. You can update the name on your certificate yourself — here's how:

1. Open your certificate page on HackerRank.
2. In the **Full Name** field, enter the name you want to display.
3. Click **Regenerate Certificate**.
4. In the confirmation dialog, click **Update Name**.

Your certificate will be updated with the new name, and the change will apply to all your certificates.

**Important:** Please note that you can only update your name **once per account**, and the change cannot be reversed after it's made. So please make sure the name you enter is correct before confirming.

Let us know if you need any further assistance!
justification: The corpus (source 1: Certifications FAQs) directly addresses this request, providing step-by-step instructions for updating the name on a certificate. It also includes the important caveat that the name can only be changed once per account and applies to all certificates.

Issue: How do I dispute a charge
Subject: Dispute charge
response:
Thank you for reaching out to Visa Support! To dispute a charge on your Visa card, here's how the process works:

**Step 1: Contact your card issuer**
As a cardholder, the first step is to contact your card-issuing bank (the bank that issued your Visa card) directly to question the charge on your billing statement. Your issuer will then initiate the dispute process on your behalf.

**What happens next:**
Your issuer will investigate the disputed transaction. Disputes refer to the reversal of the value (in whole or in part) of a transaction by the card issuer — your bank handles this process for you.

**Tip:** Check the back of your Visa card or your bank's website for the customer service contact number to reach your issuing bank quickly.

If you need further guidance, you can also refer to Visa's dispute guidelines: [Download the Dispute Management Guidelines](https://www.visa.co.in/content/dam/VCOM/global/support-legal/documents/merchants-dispute-management-guidelines.pdf)

Is there anything else I can help you with?
justification: The corpus excerpt from the Visa Dispute Resolution page (dispute-resolution.md) outlines the dispute process, including Step 1 which states that a cardholder contacts their issuer to question a charge. This is sufficient to provide a clear, grounded response directing the user to contact their card-issuing bank.

Issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
Subject: Website Data crawl
response:
Thank you for reaching out! As a site owner, you can control whether Anthropic's crawlers access your website. Anthropic uses several different robots for web crawling (for model development, web search, and content retrieval), and you can configure your site preferences to block the ones you don't want accessing your content.

To opt out of Anthropic's crawling, you can use your website's robots.txt file to block Anthropic's specific crawlers. Anthropic follows industry-standard robots.txt directives as part of their commitment to transparency and non-intrusive crawling.

For detailed instructions on which specific robots Anthropic uses and exactly how to configure your robots.txt to block them, please visit the official support article here: https://support.claude.com/en/articles/8896518-does-anthropic-crawl-data-from-the-web-and-how-can-site-owners-block-the-crawler

If you need further assistance after reviewing that article, please don't hesitate to reach back out!

Issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
Subject: Claude for students
response:
Thank you for reaching out! As a professor looking to set up the Claude LTI key for your students, here is a summary of the steps to create a Claude LTI Developer Key in Canvas by Instructure:

1. Sign in to Canvas as an **administrator** and navigate to **Admin → Developer Keys**.
2. Click **'+ Developer Key'**, then **'+ LTI Key'**.
3. Enter the following details:
   - **Key Name:** Claude LTI
   - **Description:** A short description for the Canvas LTI 1.3 app
   - **Redirect URIs:** https://claude.ai/lti/launch
   - **Title:** Claude LTI
   - **Target Link URI:** https://claude.ai/lti/launch
   - **OpenID Connect Initiation URL:** https://claude.ai/api/lti/login
   - **JWK Method:** https://claude.ai/api/lti/keys
4. Under **Additional Settings**, toggle the **Privacy Level** to **Public**.
5. Under **Placements**, remove the defaults and add **'Course Navigation'**.

⚠️ **Please note:** These steps are intended for **Claude for Education administrators and LMS administrators**. If you do not have Canvas administrator access, you may need to coordinate with your institution's LMS or IT administrator to complete this setup.
